name: GIGABYTE B850 AORUS ELITE WIFI7 ICE ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - Support DDR5-8200(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C+A - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek 2.5GbE LAN - 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4 - Optical S/PDIF

description: Full-size ATX AM5 motherboard with PCIe 5.0, DDR5-8200 support, and Wi-Fi 7 for premium AM5 systems.
